---
title: "rig repos"
---

<!-- Generated by website/gen-cli-reference.sh. Do not edit by hand. -->

## `rig repos`

```text
TODO

Usage: rig repos [OPTIONS] [COMMAND]

Commands:
  available         List available R package repositories
  list              List configured R package repositories
  package-info      Information about the package in the repositories
  package-list      List packages in R package repositories
  package-versions  List all versions of a package in the repositories
  setup             Set up R package repositories
  help              Print this message or the help of the given subcommand(s)

Options:
      --json
          JSON output

      --user
          Run in user mode (overrides RIG_MODE and config)

      --admin
          Run in admin mode (overrides RIG_MODE and config)

  -h, --help
          Print help (see a summary with '-h')
```

### `rig repos available`

```text
List available R package repositories

Usage: rig repos available [OPTIONS]

Options:
      --json   JSON output
      --user   Run in user mode (overrides RIG_MODE and config)
      --admin  Run in admin mode (overrides RIG_MODE and config)
  -h, --help   Print help
```

### `rig repos list`

```text
List configured R package repositories

Usage: rig repos list [OPTIONS]

Options:
      --json                   JSON output
      --all                    Show all repositories, not just the default ones
      --raw                    Do not resolve `%` variables in repository URLs.
  -r, --r-version <r-version>  R version to list repositories for, instead of the default
      --user                   Run in user mode (overrides RIG_MODE and config)
      --admin                  Run in admin mode (overrides RIG_MODE and config)
  -h, --help                   Print help
```

### `rig repos package-info`

```text
Information about the package in the repositories

Usage: rig repos package-info [OPTIONS] <package>

Arguments:
  <package>  package to show

Options:
  -v, --version <version>  package version to show (default: latest)
      --json               JSON output
      --user               Run in user mode (overrides RIG_MODE and config)
      --admin              Run in admin mode (overrides RIG_MODE and config)
  -h, --help               Print help
```

### `rig repos package-list`

```text
List packages in R package repositories

Usage: rig repos package-list [OPTIONS]

Options:
      --json                   JSON output
      --platform <platform>    Platform to use, instead of the current
      --r-version <r-version>  R version to use, instead of the default
      --pkg-type <pkg-type>    Type of packages to list (e.g. source, binary)
      --user                   Run in user mode (overrides RIG_MODE and config)
      --admin                  Run in admin mode (overrides RIG_MODE and config)
  -h, --help                   Print help
```

### `rig repos package-versions`

```text
List all versions of a package in the repositories

Usage: rig repos package-versions [OPTIONS] <package>

Arguments:
  <package>  package to show

Options:
      --json   JSON output
      --user   Run in user mode (overrides RIG_MODE and config)
      --admin  Run in admin mode (overrides RIG_MODE and config)
  -h, --help   Print help
```

### `rig repos setup`

```text
Set up R package repositories

Usage: rig repos setup [OPTIONS]

Options:
  -r, --r-version <r-version>
          R version to set up repositories for (default: all)
      --with-repos=<with-repos>
          Repositories to enable, in addition to the ones enabled by default.
          If --without-repos is also specified (without a value), then only these
          repositories will be enabled.
      --without-repos[=<without-repos>]
          Do not set up package repositories.
          Alternatively, specify which ones to skip, a comma-separated list.
          If --with-repos is also specified, then only the repositories in that
          argument will be enabled.
      --user
          Run in user mode (overrides RIG_MODE and config)
      --admin
          Run in admin mode (overrides RIG_MODE and config)
  -h, --help
          Print help
```
